payload.answer: I can’t remember this article because the URL could not be fetched and no article content was provided. I won’t create memory from an unavailable or unverifiable source.

entity_resolution.reason: The input asks to remember an article, but the provided URL is malformed/ambiguous and the mock fetch result indicates a 404 network error, so no article content or durable claims can be verified.

details: Fetch failed with mock result: 404 network error.
No source claims were committed to memory.

repair_options: Paste the article text or a summary you want remembered.
Clarify the exact URL if the punctuation was mistyped, e.g. https://example.com/missing
